rows.label: qev093205_MSG0010
rows.name:
Looks like they're still not
here. Ugh, I'm so hungry the
room's starting to spin...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093205_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ah well. We've come this far. Might
as well stick it out, dammit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093205_MSG0040
rows.name:
Oh, hey, this is perfect. Feel
free to join in too, folks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093205_MSG0050
rows.name: Oh? Join in what? Is it something fun?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093205_MSG0060
rows.name:
Yeah, you can bet your bottom dollar.
Mind if I borrow your kitchen counters?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev093205_MSG0070
rows.name:
They should be arriving
any minute now...[ST:wait ]
